2605.25832.title: When Search Becomes Memory: Turning Robot Design Trials into Transferable Skills
2605.25832.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as proposal generators for evolutionary robot design, yet most loops remain memoryless: simulator results shape the next population but are not preserved as reusable design knowledge. We present Auto-Robotist, a self-evolving LLM agent that distills morphology-search traces into an explicit natural-language skill library. Each skill stores a structural archetype, evidence-grounded positive and negative rules, and the evaluated designs that support them, making design memory inspectable rather than implicit in a population. During search, the agent retrieves skills to condition LLM edits of elite bodies while retaining a Genetic Algorithm (GA) mutation path for exploration; after evaluation, it updates the library through Add, Diagnose, and Merge. Across seven EvoGym tasks spanning locomotion, traversal, and object interaction, Auto-Robotist improves cold-start 5x5 search and transfers learned skills to 10x10 design spaces, where reference-conditioned transfer outperforms GA on every task. These results suggest that LLM agents can convert expensive physical evaluations into reusable, auditable design principles. Our code will be released upon acceptance.
2605.25832.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）越來越多地被用作進化機器人設計的提案生成器，但大多數迴圈仍然是無記憶的：模擬結果塑造下一代族群，但不會被保留為可重用的設計知識。<lb/>我們提出了Auto-Robotist，一個自我進化的LLM代理，將形態搜尋的痕跡提煉成明確的自然語言技能庫。<lb/>每個技能存儲一個結構原型、基於證據的正面和負面規則，以及支持它們的評估設計，使設計記憶可檢查，而不是隱含於一個族群中。<lb/>在搜尋過程中，代理檢索技能以調整精英個體的LLM編輯，同時保留基因演算法（GA）突變路徑以進行探索；在評估後，它通過添加、診斷和合併更新庫。<lb/>在涵蓋運動、穿越和物體互動的七個EvoGym任務中，Auto-Robotist改善了冷啟動5x5搜尋，並將學習到的技能轉移到10x10設計空間，其中參考條件轉移在每個任務上都超越了GA。<lb/>這些結果表明，LLM代理可以將昂貴的物理評估轉換為可重用、可審計的設計原則。<lb/>我們的代碼將在接受後發布。
2605.25832.author: Yunfei Wang et.al.
2605.25832.authors: Yunfei Wang, Xiaohao Xu, Yang Li, Xiaonan Huang
